scripts.dev:app: npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared build && concurrently -k -s first -n shared,server,web "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-server dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-web dev"
scripts.dev:server: npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared build && concurrently -k -s first -n shared,server "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-server dev"
scripts.dev:web: npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared build && concurrently -k -s first -n shared,web "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-web dev"
scripts.dev:cli: npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared build && concurrently -k -s first -n shared,cli "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-cli dev"
